name: get_kb_status
description: Returns KB ingestion status: the timestamp of the most recent successful ingestion, a per-account breakdown of last ingestion times, and the number of chunks ingested in the last 7 days. Use this when the user asks about the latest KB load date, data freshness, or ingestion history.

user_id.description: The user ID to query ingestion status for.

domain.description: Optional domain filter (e.g. 'macroeconomics'). Omit to get status for all domains.

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this status was checked.

last_ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent successful ingestion across all accounts. Null if no ingestion has occurred.

chunks_ingested_last_7d.description: Number of content chunks ingested in the last 7 days.

accounts.description: Per-account ingestion breakdown, ordered by most recently ingested first.
